case_title: DEBRA J. DOLCH VS. ALLEN MATKINS LECK GAMBLE MALLORY & NATSIS, LLP ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOLCH, DEBRA J. , AS CONSERVATOR OF THE ESTATE OF NELLIE WONG BERTUCCI AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN MATKINS LECK GAMBLE MALLORY & NATSIS, LLP DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-10-2021 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-07-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-16-2021
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-10-2021 CONTINUED TO APR-21-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-10-2021 CONTINUED TO OCT-19-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100138255)
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DOLCH, DEBRA J. , AS CONSERVATOR OF THE ESTATE OF NELLIE WONG BERTUCCI
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100127156) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOLCH, DEBRA J. , AS CONSERVATOR OF THE ESTATE OF NELLIE WONG BERTUCCI JURY DEMANDED
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100128111) DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF DOLCH, DEBRA J. , AS CONSERVATOR OF THE ESTATE OF NELLIE WONG BERTUCCI
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 100137987) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOLCH, DEBRA J. , AS CONSERVATOR OF THE ESTATE OF NELLIE WONG BERTUCCI
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-19-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-08-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-21-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-08-2021 CONTINUED TO AUG-10-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
